title: Portfolio Website
excerpt: A modern, minimal portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features markdown-driven content management and static site generation.

title: Design System Library
excerpt: A comprehensive design system with reusable UI components, design tokens, and documentation. Built for scalability and consistency across multiple projects.

title: CLI Task Manager
excerpt: A terminal-based task management tool with keyboard navigation, syntax highlighting, and SQLite storage. Built with Go for cross-platform compatibility.

title: AI Blog
excerpt: A modern retro-style static blog system built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MDX. Designed for developers and content creators who appreciate clean design and powerful features.
